mapper.select: SELECT lm.id, lm.title, lm.material_year, lm.material_month, lm.set_number, lm.level, lm.type, lm.duration, lm.difficulty, lm.cover_image, lm.audio_url, lm.play_count, lm.mastered_rate, FALSE as is_collected FROM listening_materials lm ORDER BY lm.material_year DESC, lm.material_month DESC, lm.set_number ASC, lm.type ASC
mapper.insert: insert into listening_materials (id, title, material_year, material_month, set_number, level, type, duration, difficulty, cover_image, audio_url, play_count, mastered_rate, created_at, updated_at) values (#{id}, #{title}, #{year}, #{month}, #{setNumber}, #{level}, #{type}, #{duration}, #{difficulty}, #{coverImage}, #{audioUrl}, #{playCount}, #{masteredRate}, #{createdAt}, #{updatedAt})
